'''鈭歽-k-ch-sh''' ('''kayakcheshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:timeslot|timeslot]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-k-ch-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:timeslot|timeslot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-k-ch-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kayakcheshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyakcheshoko|thiyakcheshoko]] || [[word:jiyakcheshoko|jiyakcheshoko]] || [[word:shiyakcheshoko|shiyakcheshoko]] || [[word:kiyakcheshoko|kiyakcheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyakcheshoko|thuthuyakcheshoko]] || [[word:jujuyakcheshoko|jujuyakcheshoko]] || [[word:shushuyakcheshoko|shushuyakcheshoko]] || [[word:kukuyakcheshoko|kukuyakcheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyakcheshoko|thuyakcheshoko]] || [[word:juyakcheshoko|juyakcheshoko]] || [[word:shuyakcheshoko|shuyakcheshoko]] || [[word:kuyakcheshoko|kuyakcheshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyakcheshoko|thoyakcheshoko]] || [[word:joyakcheshoko|joyakcheshoko]] || [[word:shoyakcheshoko|shoyakcheshoko]] || [[word:koyakcheshoko|koyakcheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yakcheshoko|th忙yakcheshoko]] || [[word:j忙yakcheshoko|j忙yakcheshoko]] || [[word:sh忙yakcheshoko|sh忙yakcheshoko]] || [[word:k忙yakcheshoko|k忙yakcheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayakcheshoko|thathayakcheshoko]] || [[word:jajayakcheshoko|jajayakcheshoko]] || [[word:shashayakcheshoko|shashayakcheshoko]] || [[word:kakayakcheshoko|kakayakcheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayakcheshoko|thayakcheshoko]] || [[word:jayakcheshoko|jayakcheshoko]] || [[word:shayakcheshoko|shayakcheshoko]] || [[word:kayakcheshoko|kayakcheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayakcheshoko|thayakcheshoko]] || [[word:jayakcheshoko|jayakcheshoko]] || [[word:shayakcheshoko|shayakcheshoko]] || [[word:kayakcheshoko|kayakcheshoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
